calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-27-2005 Off Calendar

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-30-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Petitioner: Gregory Craig Bunch, present in pro per was sworn and examined.
The Court advised the petitioner that because there is no proof of publication, the matter will be taken off calendar until such time an amended Petitioin is filed. Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-01-2004 Off Calendar
